summary: Added a single end-of-chapter bridge so Marisol's move toward medical flows more directly into Chapter 2's overcrowded trauma-room opening. The opening remained unchanged because its scaffold is distinct from the adjacent chapter's opening, and no style-bible example_lines appeared verbatim in the draft.
edits: Added one bridge sentence at the chapter end to foreshadow heat complaints backing into the trauma-room hall before Chapter 2.
Kept the opening intact because its yard-and-time entry does not duplicate Chapter 2's trauma-room entry.
Confirmed there were no verbatim style-bible example_lines to replace.
